prior_false_positives.root_cause: check_map_duplicates() in script 85 used line.strip()==']' to terminate its scan, which was unreliable.  It continued past the MAP's closing bracket into SQL .replace() calls at lines 598-629 where these md_* names appear as string literals — not as MAP entries.
prior_false_positives.fix: Rewritten using bracket-depth character counting; now scans only the exact MAP list slice.
